text: Improve backoff and add explicit circuit-breaker in supervisor-state + recovery that triggers auto-propose
description:
Current: BACKOFF_SCHEDULE caps at 15min; errorCount grows; 'retry ceiling reached' still bubbles to friction (suggesting upstream retries in client/animator or MCP). No explicit 'open circuit' state.

Improvements:
- Add CIRCUIT_OPEN or HALTED state after e.g. 5 consecutive ERRORs (configurable).
- In that state, inject limitation + use the existing auto-propose mechanism (or direct create_aim) before allowing further retries.
- Better reset: clear on successful WRAPPING_UP with work done, persist minimal error state.
- Make schedule or max-consecutive configurable via AutonomyPolicy or project meta.
- Update attemptAction, transition, triggerError accordingly.
- Add unit tests and simulate 'retry ceiling' scenario.

Ties directly to 2b1ef4a8 sub-aim and the auto-propose logic in session-memory. Improves reliability of wrapped supervisor for autonomous loops under 7634e681.
reflection: The improvements listed are covered by completing the sub-aim 2b1ef4a8 (circuit logic, state, prompts for auto-propose, tests, configurable). Better reset via closeCircuit on recovery. Supervisor reliability improved for wrapped-agents.

status.comment: All improvements implemented via the sub-aim 2b1ef4a8 which is now done. Configurable, integrated, tested.
